description:
# Set tax & shipping defaults

These two fields are not enforced at save time, but the **first incoming order with a tax line will fail** without them.

On the Shopify Account form, scroll to **Tax Account Details** and set:

- **Default Sales Tax Account** — fallback for any unmapped tax title (e.g. `Output Tax - Company`).
- **Default Shipping Charges Account** — fallback for unmapped shipping titles (e.g. `Shipping Charges - Company`).

The **Map Shopify Taxes / Shipping Charges to Nexus Account** table is **optional** — most stores leave it empty and let the two defaults above handle everything.

This step auto-completes once **Default Sales Tax Account** is set.
name: Configure Tax and Shipping Defaults
title: Configure tax & shipping defaults
